rationale: Both evaluations land on an identical 3/10 score and cite the same two decisive concerns: failure to meet the C1 German requirement and lack of executive leadership/team management. The career-gap date change is never referenced in either evaluation, and neither version raises the gap as a concern. The wording differences (e.g., listing GISCollective vs. generic open-source, citing the BS in CS) are ordinary run-to-run paraphrasing, not reasoning that keys off the resume change.
